consistency.class_naming: Consistent with standard class naming conventions ('bard').
consistency.level_type: Level is an integer, which is standard.

quality.description_clarity: The description is clear and precisely states the mechanical effect: regaining all expended uses of Bardic Inspiration upon finishing a short or long rest.
quality.naming_relevance: The name 'Font of Inspiration' accurately reflects the feature's effect of replenishing resources.

mechanics.core_effect: Regeneration of Bardic Inspiration uses on Short/Long Rest.
mechanics.level_gating: Appropriately gated at 5th level, which is standard for major class resource refreshes or power spikes.
mechanics.comparison_to_standard: This feature is standard for the Bard class in 5th Edition D&D (often referred to as Font of Inspiration).

analysis.suggested_action: No corrections needed. Data is accurate and aligns with established ruleset expectations for this entity.
